response.justification: Bogdan's resume strongly emphasizes web and mobile development with limited C++ experience, primarily in legacy environments (e.g., NI LabWindows/CVI). While he demonstrates solid expertise in modern stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and distributed systems, his C++ role at National Instruments was brief (6 months) and not aligned with high-performance industrial automation. Additionally, there is no evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 compliance, critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and distributed systems experience (Node.js, TypeScript, React, microservices)
Proven track record in performance optimization and scalability (handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong focus on software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, code katas, mentorship)
concerns: Limited C++ experience in relevant domains (industrial automation, high-performance systems)
No demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices
No direct experience with industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (Azure)

key_factors.factor: Secure development lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
Industrial automation or distributed systems for IoT
